content: Dexie.js schema for many-to-many uses junction tables with compound indexes. Syntax: '++id, wordFormId, meaningId, [wordFormId+meaningId]'. The subclass pattern is recommended for TypeScript: extend Dexie, declare EntityTable<T, primaryKey> properties, call this.version(n).stores(). Migrations increment the version number and add an upgrade function. The db singleton is exported from a single db.ts file.
